title: epipactis muelleri var. peitzii
intro: Epipactis muelleri var. peitzii, also known as the Peitz's Helleborine, is a variety of orchid native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its reported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Epipactis muelleri var. peitzii is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
